_comment: Spec 013 / T08 — Tesla per-job detail envelope for listing 200001. Exercises the FULL four-field path: jobDescription + jobResponsibilities + jobRequirements + jobCompensationAndBenefits all populated. After composeDescription() this should produce a string containing all four labelled sections joined by `\n\n`.
jobDescription: Tesla's Vehicle Firmware team is building the embedded software that runs every Tesla vehicle on the road. Join us to design and ship low-latency control systems on bare-metal targets.
jobResponsibilities:
- Own embedded firmware modules from architecture through field rollout.
- Collaborate with hardware engineers on bring-up of new ECUs.
- Author unit + HIL test coverage for safety-critical paths.
jobRequirements:
- BS in Electrical / Computer Engineering or equivalent.
- 5+ years C / C++ on resource-constrained MCUs (ARM Cortex-M, Cortex-R).
- Deep familiarity with CAN, FlexRay, automotive Ethernet stacks.
jobCompensationAndBenefits: Base salary range: $180,000 — $260,000 USD. Equity, comprehensive medical / dental / vision, 401(k) with match, on-site amenities at Palo Alto HQ.
